items.title: New Xbox CEO guts company from the inside out: Over 3,200 staffers fired, development teams sold, more
items.summary: We knew it was coming after stories flooded the net over the last week, but Xbox just announced a massive number of layoffs with plans to dump roughly 20% off its staff starting today.

items.title: Nintendo will stop selling the original Switch in Europe next year
items.summary: Nintendo is making a new version of the Switch 2 with a replaceable battery in Europe - but its predecessor has a very different future. As part of an updated FAQ about revisions to Nintendo hardware in Europe, the company confirmed that it will stop selling all iterations of the original Switch on the continent […]

items.title: How to reserve and change your WhatsApp username
items.summary: WhatsApp now lets users reserve usernames ahead of the feature’s full rollout, making it possible to connect without sharing a phone number once usernames go live.

items.title: Logitech’s G Pro X Superlight 2 SE LIGHTSPEED wireless gaming mouse is 50% off today at $80 low
items.summary: As part of its wider sale on gaming mice and mousepads, Woot is now offering Logitech’s G Pro X Superlight 2 SE LIGHTSPEED wireless gaming mouse in white for $89.99 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). You can also use code MOUSEWOOT at checkout to take an extra $10 off as a new customer, dropping the total to $79.99. This model typically sells for $160 at Amazon, so you’re looking at $80 off and 50% in savings at the listed deal price. That marks the return of the lowest price we first tracked for this unit last month. Head below for more details.

items.title: Memo: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma says the unit will divest five studios, including Ninja Theory, alongside 3,200 job cuts, to streamline the business, in a "reset" (Bloomberg)

Bloomberg:
Memo: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma says the unit will divest five studios, including Ninja Theory, alongside 3,200 job cuts, to streamline the business, in a “reset”  —  Compulsion and Double Fine studios will become independent; Undead Labs and Ninja Theory will be sold.

On your way down, check out these Apple Watch Ultra 3 models at nearly $100 off as well as M5 MacBook Air at $150 off, this 13-inch M5 iPad Pro at $420 off the new list price, and the ongoing all-time low on AirTag 2. The app deals await below.

items.title: Microsoft is selling off four Xbox studios as part of significant gaming cuts
items.summary: Microsoft is laying off 4,800 employees today, and more than 30 percent of the job losses are in the company's Xbox division. The significant gaming cuts will affect nearly every part of Xbox and also involve four game studios being spun off to be run independently from Microsoft. Today's layoffs, which are being described as […]

items.title: Microsoft is laying off 4,800 employees
items.summary: A year after cutting around 9,100 employees, Microsoft is making further layoffs today as it begins its new financial year. The software maker is laying off around 4,800 employees today, approximately 2.1 percent of its workforce. Most of the employees affected by today's cuts are in Microsoft's commercial sales business or the company's Xbox division. […]

items.title: Switch 2 game deals: Final Fantasy VII Remake $30, REANIMAL 33% off, Civ VII, Zelda, more
items.summary:
Joining a host of hangover July 4th deals on witch games below, including Kirby Air Riders and some of the best prices to date on Zelda: Breath of the Wild Switch 2 Edition and the Switch 2 Upgrade Pack, we have a few new titles to add to the list. The Final Fantasy VII Remake Intergrade Switch 2 Edition has dropped back down to $29.83 Prime shipped at Amazon for a solid 25% off, while the REANIMAL: Deluxe Edition for Switch 2 (from the original creators of Little Nightmares) is now 33% off at $39.99 – the standard edition is down at $29.99 via Best Buy. Everything else awaits below. 

  • Zelda: Breath of the Wild Switch 2 Edition $49 (Reg. $70)
  • Zelda: Breath of the Wild Switch 2 Edition Upgrade Pack $7 (Reg. $10)
  • Kirby Air Riders for Nintendo Switch 2 $50 (Reg. $70) – Amazon all-time low

  • Sid Meier’s Civilization VII Switch 2 $30 (Reg. $40)
  • Cronos Switch 2 $27.50 (Reg. $40)
  • Final Fantasy VII Remake Intergrade Switch 2 $30 (Reg. $70)
  • Metroid Prime 4: Beyond Nintendo Switch 2 Edition $45 (Reg. $70)
  • Mario Galaxy + Super Mario Galaxy 2 $50 (Reg. $70)
  • Mario & Luigi: Brothership from $25 (Reg. $60)
  • And even more…

items.summary:
The Hobbit And The Lord Of The Rings: Deluxe Pocket Boxed Set

Buy for $25 (Reg. $36.50+)

What we love

This four-volume, pocket-sized box set includes a nice leatherette-bound box for the shelf with gold foil stamping to match the leatherette cover and stamped title on each f the four books.

These remain some of JBL’s more feature-packed earbuds, complete with ANC and a touchscreen-equipped charging case, among other things, and you can learn more of its features below.

Samsung Galaxy Magnetic Wireless 5,000mAh Battery Pack

Buy for $56 (Reg. $65)

What we love

If you’re rocking a magnetic case on your S26 series Galaxy phone, and are looking for proper magnetic power bank that will actually fit the back of the phone because of the camera bump, this is the official option. It’s not for everyone, and there are some great alternatives out there that you can get to fit, but for folks looking towards the first-party solution, this deal is within a couple bucks of the Amazon all-time low.

items.title: Amazon’s eero 6 mesh Wi-Fi routers drop back to Prime Day prices from $50 (Up to 50% off)
items.summary: Amazon is offering its eero 6 mesh Wi-Fi routers starting at $49.99 shipped for an extender unit. This extender unit typically goes for $80, and it can extend your existing mesh router. It dropped to the $50 mark for the first time during the recent Prime Day sale, and it’s now back to that price with a 38% markdown. You can even score a single-node eero 6 mesh Wi-Fi router to start a fresh network for $54.99 shipped, which is down from its usual price of $90. All these eero 6 routers are back to the Prime Day all-times lows we first tracked for them just a few days back at up to 50% off, making this a great time to grab them in case you missed the Prime Day deals. Head below for more details.

items.title: Store your Apple Watch bands the elegant way: Twelve South TimePorter Organizer now down at $24
items.summary:
Twelve South TimePorter Watch Strap Organizer

Buy for $24 (Reg. $30)

What we love

A neat, tidy, and elegant way to both store and keep your Apple Watch band collection on display, the Twelve South TimePorter is a purpose-built rack mount “to accommodate all Apple Watch bands securely, whether metal, silicone, or leather.” Now 20% off the regular price for a single rack, “TimePorter mounts securely to most surfaces using strong, non-damaging 3M strips” at the lowest price we have tracked in several months on Amazon.
